## What would you improve

<!-- Name the specific thing: a skill, a phase doc, an agent, a template, the README. -->

- **File or component:** <!-- e.g., `.claude/skills/build/SKILL.md`, `docs/workflow/extending.md` -->
- **Type of change:** <!-- New section / Clarification / New skill / New agent / Other -->

## Current behavior

<!-- What does it do now? Quote the relevant section if applicable. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What should it do instead? Be as concrete as possible. A draft of the new content is welcome. -->

## Why this matters

<!-- What problem does this solve? Which user (solo dev, team lead, template adopter) benefits? -->

## Use case that triggered this

<!-- Briefly describe the real situation that made you feel this was missing or wrong. -->

## Have you tested the proposed change?

- [ ] Yes — I tested this in a real project and it works
- [ ] Partially — I tested part of it
- [ ] No — this is a proposal only
